name: my-skills
description: A lightweight documented engineering workflow for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Documented lightweight development workflow for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use My Skills to route engineering work through project context setup, domain language capture, lightweight documentation, implementation planning, local issue slicing, optional subagent coordination, behavior-first TDD, disciplined diagnosis, review feedback rigor, fresh verification, and concise communication.
defaultPrompt: I want to build a feature with a lightweight documented workflow.
Help me fix this bug without skipping diagnosis or verification.
